# Antares Resilience

Antares Resilience is a Pacific Northwest based electrical estimating, preconstruction, and infrastructure advisory practice led by Oliver Gribble in Snohomish, Washington.

Antares supports electrical contractors, general contractors, owners, and developers where early cost clarity, estimate validation, scope reconciliation, and technical electrical judgment matter.

Primary services:
- Pre-design electrical estimating and ROM support
- Independent electrical estimate and peer review
- Electrical scope reconciliation and risk review
- Electrical preconstruction advisory
- Critical power and infrastructure feasibility review

Useful pages:
- Home: https://antaresresilience.com/
- Services: https://antaresresilience.com/services
- About: https://antaresresilience.com/about
- Contact: https://antaresresilience.com/contact

Engagement boundary: Antares provides electrical estimating, preconstruction advisory, estimate review, and infrastructure risk review. Antares does not replace the engineer of record, licensed design services, contractor means and methods, or legal advice.

Primary call to action: Discuss a Project.

Contact: signal@antaresresilience.com
